evidence: Best Cartoon EVER! Wonderful for both kids and adults.
Ben 10: Alien Force is a thoroughly enjoyable sci-fi series that kids and adults can enjoy together!
This cartoon is hilarious! It is so funny that I sometimes laugh out loud.

Salma Hayak is so fine, and Mathew Perry is so funny.

summary: The user enjoys animated and sci-fi content, particularly those that are entertaining and humorous. They have a preference for fast-paced narratives and a strong emotional connection to shows they enjoy, although they show some indifference to production quality.
